# warpstream_sso_configuration (Resource)

This resource allows you to create, update and delete sso configurations.

The WarpStream provider must be authenticated with an account key to consume this resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `default_role_id` (String) Default Role ID. The Default Role of a user when they login to SSO for the first time. You can use https://docs.warpstream.com/warpstream/reference/api-reference/user-roles/list to get the Role IDs.
- `entity_id` (String) SAML Entity ID. The Entity ID for your SAML Protocol provider.
- `saml_url` (String) SAML Sign In URL. The SSO SAML Protocol URL for your SAML provider..
- `signing_certificate` (String) X509 Signing Certificate. SAML Protocol server public key encoded in PEM format.
- `sso_identifier` (String) SSO Identifier. The unique SSO identifier that will be used to identify your team.

### Optional

- `enable_sso_role_mapping` (Boolean) Enable SSO Role Mapping.When enabled, user roles will be automatically assigned or unassigned based on SSO group membership.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) SSO configuration ID.
